sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74205" key="o)nuxofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνῠχο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying the nails,</tr_> of the last phalanx of the finger, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.238.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
